description: Immutable prospective forecast registration anchored to a shipped reviewed hypothesis packet, including the full frozen packet payload and the separately hashed scoreable forecast payload.

required_fields.name: registration_id
required_fields.description: Stable immutable identifier for the registered forecast.

required_fields.name: registered_at
required_fields.description: ISO datetime recording when the forecast was frozen.

required_fields.name: registered_by
required_fields.description: Human or process label that registered the forecast.

required_fields.name: packet_artifact
required_fields.description: Reference to the exact reviewed hypothesis packet artifact and packet pointer that grounded the forecast.

required_fields.name: packet_scope
required_fields.description: Denormalized entity, policy, and domain identifiers copied from the referenced packet.

required_fields.name: frozen_packet_payload
required_fields.description: Exact reviewed packet payload copied from the referenced hypothesis packet artifact.

required_fields.name: frozen_packet_payload_sha256
required_fields.description: Canonical sha256 hash of the frozen reviewed packet payload.

required_fields.name: frozen_forecast_payload
required_fields.description: Explicit scoreable forecast payload with decision options, probabilities, horizon, and rationale.

required_fields.name: frozen_forecast_payload_sha256
required_fields.description: Canonical sha256 hash of the frozen scoreable forecast payload.

optional_fields.name: notes
optional_fields.description: Optional notes about the registration context.
